business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial construction contractor — operations include carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, interior painting, project management/superintendent, and clerical office functions

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580; Policy Period 2025-08-01 to 2026-08-01; PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet; Large Risk Rating Plan; Interstate Rating: No; Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.86; Total Payroll: 31594850; Expected Losses: 951902

positives: Favorable experience modification factor of 0.86, indicating better-than-average loss experience relative to peers
Calculated mod below 1.0 suggests actual losses are below expected levels
Relatively low incurred loss development (total paid vs. total incurred figures are closely aligned across all policy years, indicating limited reserve development)
Large Risk rating plan eligibility indicates significant premium volume and risk sophistication
concerns: High-hazard classification mix including carpentry (5403), masonry (5022), plumbing (5183), and electrical wiring (5190) operations
2021-2022 policy year had 10 claims with $240,694 in total incurred losses, representing the highest claim frequency year
Three policy years of loss data show consistent claim activity with no loss-free years
Total actual losses across three years: $548,404 incurred across 20 claims
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three policy years of loss data: 2021-2022 (10 claims, $240,694 incurred, $156,716 primary / $83,978 excess); 2022-2023 (3 claims, $116,479 incurred, $58,500 primary / $57,979 excess); 2023-2024 (7 claims, $191,231 incurred, $120,455 primary / $70,776 excess). Total: 20 claims, $548,404 total incurred, $335,671 actual primary losses, $212,733 actual excess losses. Valuation date 2026-03-15.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: PCRB Experience Rating Worksheet for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. (Policy WC-KCB-2025-5580) prepared by Hallmark Insurance Group. Valuation Date 2026-03-15. Risk ID 491498-1604. Large Risk Rating Plan, Pennsylvania only, non-interstate. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.86.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial construction operations spanning seven workers compensation classifications: Carpentry NOC (5403, $5,915,000 payroll), Electrical Wiring (5190, $4,544,000 payroll), Plumbing NOC (5183, $3,075,000 payroll), Masonry NOC (5022, $6,635,850 payroll), Painting Interior (5474, $1,639,000 payroll), Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent (5606, $4,776,000 payroll), Clerical Office Employees NOC (8810, $5,010,000 payroll). Total payroll: $31,594,850.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2023-2024: 7 claims, $190,770 paid, $191,231 incurred, $120,455 primary losses, $70,776 excess losses. 2022-2023: 3 claims, $115,267 paid, $116,479 incurred, $58,500 primary losses, $57,979 excess losses. 2021-2022: 10 claims, $240,694 paid, $240,694 incurred, $156,716 primary losses, $83,978 excess losses. Rating calculation: Expected Losses (E) $1,095,520; Actual Primary Losses (Ap) $335,671; Actual Excess Losses (Ae) $212,733; Weighting Factor (W) 0.574; Expected Excess Losses (Ee) $1,132,496; Ballast Value (B) $13,748; Numerator $953,971; Denominator $1,109,268; Calculated Mod 0.8600.
